text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the Tenno Sho (Spring). A pre-race
interview with Mejiro McQueen and Rice Shower
is playing on the TV in the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon's desire to win surges
exponentially as she watches the segment, and
she expresses anxiousness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I steady her nerves by telling her that her anxiety
can be put to good use. After calming down, she
begins to burn with the determination to win.
